name: Ananya K.
comment: They turned my screenshot into a **flawless blouse** — darts and fall exactly right. **Quick, kind WhatsApp updates** the whole way.

name: Meera S.
comment: Alteration on my silk dress was **invisible** — **perfect hem** and timeline.

name: Priya R.
comment: Loved the fabric suggestions. Delivery was a day later than hoped but quality made up for it.

name: Divya N.
comment: Custom kurti from their gallery reference — fit and neckline exactly as discussed. Delivery matched the date we locked in WhatsApp.

name: Sneha P.
comment: Clear pricing after measurements on chat. COD was smooth.

name: Kavita M.
comment: My festive blouse and my daughter's little top — both finished with care. Each piece was quoted separately before we started; no surprises.
